The player moved from [27, 21] to [27, 18] after LEFT - that's 3 cells to the left, consistent with the 3-cell movement pattern. Still 8 boxes remaining.
Let me think about the game mechanics:
- Player moves 3 cells at a time along the cross arms
- SPACE teleports between the two cross intersections
- There are 8 small boxes with colored centers (4 yellow, 4 blue)
- The goal is likely to collect all boxes
The yellow cross horizontal arm goes from col 10 to col 32 at row 27. The vertical arm goes from row 16 to row 38 at col 21.
The blue cross horizontal arm goes from col 23 to col 49 at row 33. The vertical arm goes from row 20 to row 46 at col 36.
Yellow-centered boxes centers:
- [3, 15]
- [9, 6]
- [9, 24]
- [17, 15]
Blue-centered boxes centers:
- [16, 48]
- [24, 40]
- [24, 53]
- [35, 48]
The player can only move along the cross arms. Let me figure out which boxes are reachable:
- Yellow cross horizontal: row 27, cols 10-32 (player moves in steps of 3 from center [27,21])
  - LEFT: [27, 18], [27, 15], [27, 12]
  - RIGHT: [27, 24], [27, 27], [27, 30]
- Yellow cross vertical: col 21, rows 16-38
  - UP: [24, 21], [21, 21], [18, 21]
  - DOWN: [30, 21], [33, 21], [36, 21]
None of the boxes are directly on the cross arms. So maybe SPACE does something else when near a box, or maybe the goal is different.
Wait, let me reconsider. Maybe the player needs to move to positions adjacent to the boxes. Let me check which boxes are closest to the cross arms.
Yellow box at [9, 24] - this is near row 9, col 24. The yellow cross horizontal arm is at row 27. The vertical arm is at col 21. The closest point on the yellow cross to [9, 24] would be [16, 21] (top of vertical arm) or [27, 24] (on horizontal arm).
Actually, let me reconsider the game. Maybe SPACE near a box collects it? Or maybe the goal is to position the player at specific locations and press SPACE?
Let me try a different approach: move to various positions and press SPACE to see what happens. Let me first try moving to the edge of the yellow cross and pressing SPACE.
Actually, let me first explore more systematically. Let me move to all reachable positions on both crosses and see if any box gets collected.
